operating_rule: Maintain constructive and exclusion routes concurrently. Preserve the running fixed 20-leaf benchmark as the first certificate-portfolio measurement, then allocate each bounded tranche by expected reduction of the remaining global uncertainty rather than incumbent momentum.
portfolio_rule: A method is eligible when it yields net-new independently validated progress within a fixed budget. A 40-block witness settles C(12,6,4)=40 after independent direct verification. Otherwise, a mixed-method union may settle C(12,6,4)=41 only after all 47 canonical frontier nodes have replayable certificates and independent global coverage validation.
selection_policy: Give the forced-matching exact-degree 40-block witness search and the 47-node certified exclusion route symmetric active consideration.
Do not interrupt or modify cardinality-encoding-20-leaf-20260722; retain its original comparison hypothesis and fixed budget.
After each result, compare constructive search, certificate search, structural reduction, alternative formulations, and transfer methods by expected marginal validated uncertainty reduction.
Scale only after a cheap semantic-equivalence or direct-witness gate, and avoid duplicating closures except for assigned independent validation.
Treat solver status as provisional: directly verify SAT witnesses and reconstruct, replay, and independently audit every UNSAT leaf.

phases.objective: Settle the 40-versus-41 uncertainty by the cheapest honest combination of a validated 40-block witness or exhaustive certified exclusion.
phases.cheapest_discriminator: Complete the immutable 20-leaf encoding benchmark while independently running a short forced-matching exact-degree 40-block witness discriminator under a predeclared direct-validation gate.
phases.required_artifact: A hash-bound uncertainty/frontier manifest, per-route scores and bounded receipts, direct witness validation for SAT, replayable proof plus independent audit for UNSAT leaves, and an independent final coverage check.
phases.promote_if: A directly and independently validated 40-block cover is found, or the certificate portfolio reaches 47/47 valid closures and the global canonical partition is independently checked.
phases.kill_if: Never kill the target from one method's poor average result; demote only the specific route whose expected marginal value has fallen below a materially better alternative.
phases.fallback: Rescore all five resolution-path families and assign the cheapest discriminator to the highest-value remaining uncertainty.
